form.formComment: Recorded a 0.8 lengths win (22.53) in a OPEN last time at this track. Box stats strong with six wins and three placings from 11 starts. Looks suited and should go close.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (23.27) in a Other, finishing a 11 length sixth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and four minors. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (16.94) over 300m at Murray Bridge Straight. Squeeze draw to overcome. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 5 lengths over 342m at Angle Park in a handy (19.69), beating He's No Diva. Ran the fastest time on the program in the latest win. Worth following up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked first turn; Checked turn into home straight.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (20.01) at Angle Park in a OPEN, finishing fifth and beaten 6 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and four minors. Can hit the frame with the right run.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a Grade 5 at Murray Bridge when a 2 length second but did run a quick 25.52 over the 455m journey. Has the ability and looks hard to top.
